Avvertimento: [38;5;252mThe statistic is based on a difference or ratio; by default, for difference-based statistics, the explanatory
variable is subtracted in the order "BAS" - "SMA", or divided in the order "BAS" / "SMA" for ratio-based statistics.
To specify this order yourself, supply `order = c("BAS", "SMA")` to the calculate() function.[39m
